title: Configure SFTP Delivery
description: Set up secure SFTP server delivery for squid run results

content.introduction: Configure SFTP delivery to securely store run results on your own SFTP server. Results will be automatically uploaded to your specified server and directory when runs complete.

parameters.name: ftp_fields.host
parameters.description: SFTP server hostname or IP address

parameters.name: ftp_fields.directory
parameters.description: Target directory path on the SFTP server where files will be uploaded

parameters.name: ftp_fields.is_active
parameters.description: Set to true to enable SFTP delivery, false to disable

parameters.name: squid
parameters.description: The unique identifier (hash) of the squid for which to configure SFTP delivery

proTips.content: Ensure your SFTP server is accessible from lobstr.io's servers. Check firewall rules and IP allowlists if connection fails.
Use the Test SFTP endpoint to verify your credentials and server connectivity before activating automatic delivery.
The directory path must exist on the server. Lobstr will not create directories automatically.
Store SFTP credentials securely. While they're returned in API responses, treat them as sensitive data.
Set is_active to false to temporarily disable SFTP delivery without removing your configuration.

seo.title: Configure SFTP Delivery - lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to set up secure SFTP server delivery for squid results using the lobstr.io API. Configure SFTP credentials and target directories.
